channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: The Veronicas Cover Sombr’s ’12 to 12′ for triple j’s ‘Like A Version’
item.description: 🎶 The Veronicas bring a fresh twist to Sombr's '12 to 12' on triple j's 'Like A Version'! Hit play and feel the vibes 🎤 #MusicCoverMagic

item.title: Harry Styles Brings ‘Kiss All The Time’ Home With Manchester One Night Only Show: 7 Best Moments
item.description: Harry Styles sure knows how to make Manchester swoon! 💋 Relive the magic with these unforgettable moments! 🎶 #HarryStyles #MusicMagic

item.title: Keanu Reeves’ Dogstar Announce New Album and Tour, Share Title Track
item.description: 🚀 Rock on with Keanu Reeves’ band Dogstar as they drop a new album and hit the road! 🎸🎶 #MusicNews #DogstarTour

item.title: Fucked Up announce ‘Year of the Monkey’ ft. Dan Bejar, Keith Morris, Walter Schreifels, more, share 2 tracks
item.description: 🐒🎶 Get ready for the ultimate musical ride with Fucked Up's star-studded ‘Year of the Monkey’ album! 🚀🌟 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Angélique Kidjo announces new LP ft. Pharrell, Nile Rodgers, more, shares “Fall on Me” ft. PJ Morton
item.description: 🌟 Get ready to groove! Angélique Kidjo's upcoming LP is a star-studded affair 🎶🔥 #NewMusic #CollaborationGoals
